feedback.title: Contribute to Tolaria
feedback.description: Pick the path that fits what you want to do! Any type of help is appreciated
feedback.sponsor.title: Sponsor / Support
feedback.sponsor.description:
Luca here 👋 my full-time job is running Refactoring, a newsletter for 170K+ engineers about how to run good teams and ship software with AI. I write about workflows, interview tech leaders (e.g. DHH, Martin Fowler, and more) and run a private community of 2000+ engineers with monthly live coaching, AI club, and more.

Tolaria is FOSS and always will be. If you like it, the best way to support it is to subscribe to the newsletter.
feedback.newsletter.title: Join Refactoring
feedback.newsletter.description: Refactoring is my newsletter and community for 170K+ engineers building better teams and software with AI. Subscribing is the best way to support Tolaria!
feedback.sponsors.title: Sponsors
feedback.sponsors.description: Tolaria is supported by a panel of tools I use every day to keep the project healthy, tested, and ready for AI-assisted development.
feedback.sponsors.codacyTooltip: I use Codacy to ensure code security and quality
feedback.sponsors.codeSceneTooltip: I use CodeScene to keep code health in check
feedback.sponsors.circleCiTooltip: I use CircleCI to do inner loop validation with remote environments
feedback.sponsors.unblockedTooltip: I use Unblocked to let agents fetch the right context about the codebase
feedback.featureRequests.title: Feature requests
feedback.featureRequests.description: Search on the board first, upvote existing ideas, and create new posts when genuinely new!
feedback.discussions.title: Discussions
feedback.discussions.description: Use Discussions for questions, conversations, show & tell, and community context.
feedback.contributeCode.title: Contribute code
feedback.contributeCode.description: Small, focused PRs are welcome. Check the board first so you build the right things!
feedback.reportBug.title: Report a bug
feedback.reportBug.description: Explain how to reproduce, what you expected, vs what happened. Attach the diagnostics please!
feedback.linkFallback.title: Couldn’t open {label} automatically.
feedback.clipboardUnavailable: Clipboard access is unavailable right now. You can still open GitHub Issues directly.
onboarding.welcome.title: Welcome to Tolaria
onboarding.welcome.subtitle: Markdown knowledge management for the age of AI
onboarding.welcome.missingSubtitle: Choose a vault to start. If you had a vault here before, the folder may have moved or been deleted.
onboarding.welcome.templateOffline: Requires internet - clone later. Suggested path: {path}
onboarding.welcome.templateLoadingDescri: Cloning the Getting Started vault template
onboarding.welcome.templateStatus: Downloading the Getting Started vault template...
onboarding.welcome.createEmptyDescriptio: Start fresh in an empty folder with Tolaria defaults
onboarding.welcome.createEmptyLoadingDes: Preparing Tolaria defaults in the selected folder
onboarding.welcome.openExistingDescripti: Point to a folder you already have
onboarding.ai.checkingDescription: Looking for local AI agents on this machine.
onboarding.ai.missingDescription: No local AI agents were detected. You can keep going and set this up later.
onboarding.ai.readyDescription: Tolaria found local AI agents you can use after setup.
onboarding.ai.checkingLocalDescription: Tolaria is looking for supported local agents.
onboarding.ai.otherOptionsDescription: Tolaria also supports local models and API providers from Settings, so this screen does not need to be decided now.
command.note.newNoteInCurrentFolder: Create New Note in Current Folder
command.note.copyDeepLink: Copy deep link to current item
git.author.label: Commit author
git.author.warning.localOverridesGlobal: Repository Git author differs from your global Git author. Cancel and update this vault's git config before committing if it looks wrong.
git.commitMessage.generatedFallback: Drafted commit message from changed files
git.toast.missingAuthor: Set a Git author before AutoGit can commit. Run git config --global user.name "Your Name" and git config --global user.email you@example.com.
command.view.defaultNoteWidthNormal: Use Normal Note Width by Default
command.view.defaultNoteWidthWide: Use Wide Note Width by Default
settings.title: Settings
settings.sync.title: Sync & Updates
settings.sync.description: Configure background pulling and which update feed Tolaria follows. Stable only receives manually promoted releases, while Alpha follows every push to main.
settings.pullIntervalDescription: How often Tolaria checks for remote vault changes.
settings.releaseChannelDescription: Stable follows promoted releases; Alpha follows every push to main.
settings.automaticUpdateChecksDescriptio: Look for Tolaria releases in the background and show an update prompt when one is available.
settings.workspaces.title: Vaults
settings.workspaces.enable: Use multiple vaults at the same time
settings.workspaces.enableDescription: Experimental: load included vaults into one graph. Leave this off to use one vault at a time.
settings.workspaces.name: Name
settings.workspaces.label: Label
settings.workspaces.nameTooltip: The display name shown in menus, settings, and vault selectors.
settings.workspaces.labelTooltip: The short initials shown on notes, search results, breadcrumbs, and vault badges.
settings.workspaces.slugTooltip: The stable prefix used in cross-vault links and relationships. It is read-only for now to avoid breaking existing references.
settings.appearance.title: Appearance
settings.appearance.description: Choose the app color mode used for Tolaria chrome, editor surfaces, menus, and dialogs.
settings.theme.label: Theme
settings.language.title: Language
settings.language.description: Choose the display language for Tolaria chrome. System follows macOS when that language is supported, with English as the fallback.
settings.language.label: Display language
settings.language.summary: Missing translations fall back to English so partially translated locales stay usable.
settings.autogit.title: Git
settings.git.enableDescription: Show Git status, history, changes, commits, sync, and AutoGit controls throughout Tolaria.
settings.git.providerDescription: Choose which Git executable Tolaria uses for vault history, commits, sync, and remote operations.
settings.git.wslDistroDescription: Choose the WSL distribution that contains Git. Tolaria keeps native Windows Git available and will not switch providers silently.
settings.git.providerTestDescription: Verify the selected Git provider before saving it.
settings.git.repositoryRootParentDescrip: Repository-wide sync actions use this parent folder; Tolaria status and commits remain scoped to this vault.
settings.git.repositoryRootVaultDescript: This vault is also the Git repository root.
settings.autogit.description.enabled: Automatically create conservative Git checkpoints after editing pauses or when the app is no longer active.
settings.autogit.description.disabled: AutoGit is unavailable until the current vault is Git-enabled. Initialize Git for this vault first.
settings.autogit.description.gitDisabled: AutoGit is unavailable while Git features are disabled.
settings.autogit.enableDescription: When enabled, Tolaria will commit and push saved local changes automatically after an idle pause or after the app becomes inactive.
settings.autogit.aiCommitMessages: Use AI for AutoGit commit messages
settings.autogit.aiCommitMessagesDescrip: When enabled, AutoGit asks the configured AI model for brief semantic commit messages and falls back to deterministic labels if AI is unavailable.
settings.autogit.idleThresholdDescriptio: How long Tolaria waits after editing pauses before checkpointing.
settings.autogit.inactiveThresholdDescri: How long Tolaria waits after the app becomes inactive before checkpointing.
settings.titles.title: Titles & Filenames
settings.titles.description: Choose whether Tolaria automatically syncs untitled note filenames from the first H1 title.
settings.titles.autoRename: Auto-rename untitled notes from first H1
settings.titles.autoRenameDescription: When enabled, Tolaria renames untitled-note files as soon as the first H1 becomes a real title. Turn this off to keep the filename unchanged until you rename it manually from the breadcrumb bar.
settings.vaultContent.title: Content
settings.vaultContent.description: Control whether files matched by the vault .gitignore appear in Tolaria.
settings.dateDisplay.defaultDescription: Choose how Tolaria displays dates outside editable date fields.
settings.noteWidth.defaultDescription: Choose the rich-editor width for notes without an explicit note width.
settings.sidebarTypePluralization.label: Pluralize type names in sidebar
settings.sidebarTypePluralization.descri: When enabled, Tolaria automatically pluralizes type section labels unless a type defines its own sidebar label.
settings.vaultContent.hideGitignored: Hide files and folders ignored by Git
settings.vaultContent.hideGitignoredDesc: Keeps generated and local-only vault files out of notes, search, quick open, and folders.
settings.allNotesVisibility.title: All Notes visibility
settings.allNotesVisibility.description: Choose which non-Markdown file categories appear in All Notes. Folder browsing still shows files in their folders.
settings.allNotesVisibility.pdfsDescript: Show PDF files in All Notes. Folder browsing still shows them in their folders.
settings.allNotesVisibility.imagesDescri: Show common image files in All Notes. Folder browsing still shows them in their folders.
settings.allNotesVisibility.unsupportedD: Show other non-Markdown files without an in-app preview in All Notes. Folder browsing still shows them in their folders.
settings.aiAgents.title: AI Agents
settings.aiAgents.description: Choose Tolaria's default AI target. Local agents can edit through tools; API and local models run in chat mode without vault-write tools.
settings.aiFeatures.enableDescription: Show AI panel controls, AI command-palette mode, and AI status prompts. Turn this off to hide AI surfaces until you re-enable them here.
settings.aiAgents.notInstalled: {agent} is not installed yet. You can still select it now and install it later.
settings.aiAgents.apiLocalKey: Its API key is saved locally on this device.
settings.aiAgents.apiEnv: Its API key is read from {env}.
settings.aiAgents.apiNoKey: No API key is configured, which is normal for local models.
settings.aiAgents.installedDescription: Local agents can use tools to inspect and edit the vault. Install status is detected from this device.
settings.aiProviders.title: Model providers
settings.aiProviders.description: Add local or API-backed models. These targets can answer from note context now; tool-based editing stays with local agents.
settings.aiProviders.localDescription: Connect Ollama or LM Studio. These models stay in chat mode and can run with or without an API key.
settings.aiProviders.apiDescription: Connect hosted providers such as OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, OpenRouter, or another OpenAI-compatible endpoint.
settings.aiProviders.name: Name
settings.aiProviders.keySafety: Tolaria does not store provider API keys in settings. For hosted APIs, put the key in an environment variable and enter that variable name here.
settings.aiProviders.keySafetyLocal: Saved API keys are written to Tolaria's local app data with owner-only file permissions. They are not stored in vault settings or synced between devices.
settings.aiProviders.localSafety: Local providers are called from this device. If your local server requires a key, save it locally or read it from an environment variable.
settings.aiProviders.testSuccess: Connection works. The model replied successfully.
settings.aiProviders.empty: No providers configured in this section yet.
settings.workflow.title: Workflow
settings.workflow.description: Choose whether Tolaria shows the Inbox workflow, plus how it moves through items while you triage them.
settings.workflow.explicitDescription: When enabled, an Inbox section shows unorganized notes, and a toggle lets you mark notes as organized.
settings.workflow.autoAdvanceDescription: When enabled, marking an Inbox note as organized immediately opens the next visible Inbox note.
settings.privacy.title: Telemetry
settings.privacy.description: Anonymous data helps us fix bugs and improve Tolaria. No vault content, note titles, or file paths are ever sent.
customize.templatePlaceholder: Markdown template for new notes of this type…
viewDialog.description.create: Create a saved view by choosing a name and filter rules.
viewDialog.description.edit: Update the name and filters for this saved view.
ai.permission.safe.tooltip: Vault Safe keeps agents limited to file, search, and edit tools.
ai.permission.powerUser.tooltip: Power User also allows local shell commands for this vault.
ai.permission.changed: AI permission mode changed to {label}. It will apply to the next message.
ai.panel.title: AI Agent
ai.panel.mode.chatDescription: Chat mode can use note context, but it does not get vault-write tools or shell access.
ai.panel.empty.checkingDescription: Messages can be sent when the selected agent is ready
ai.panel.empty.missingTitle: {agent} is not available on this machine
ai.panel.empty.missingDescription: Install it or switch the default AI agent in Settings
ai.panel.empty.noContextTitle: Open a note, then ask {agent} about it
ai.panel.empty.noContextDescription: The AI will use the active note as context
ai.panel.placeholder.missing: {agent} is not installed. Open AI Agents in Settings.
ai.error.claude.tooManyRedirects: Claude Code could not connect to its provider because the API request redirected too many times. In Terminal, run `claude auth status`, then `claude auth login` if needed. If you use a custom provider or proxy, check ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL, HTTPS_PROXY, HTTP_PROXY, and corporate SSO/proxy settings, then restart Tolaria.
ai.error.pi.emptyOutput: Pi CLI exited without agent output. Tolaria expected JSON stream events from `pi --mode json`; run Pi in a terminal to inspect the setup.
ai.error.pi.emptyOutputWithDiagnostic:
Pi CLI exited without agent output. Tolaria expected JSON stream events from `pi --mode json`, but Pi only wrote:
{diagnostic_output}
ai.workspace.title: Agents
ai.workspace.modelUnavailable: The saved model is no longer available. Tolaria will use Agent default for the next prompt; choose another model from the Model menu.
mcp.setup.connectedDescription: Tolaria is already connected to external AI tools for this vault. Reconnect to refresh the configuration, or disconnect to remove Tolaria from those third-party config files.
mcp.setup.setupDescription: Tolaria can add its MCP server to external AI tools for this vault, but it will not touch third-party config files until you confirm here.
mcp.setup.runtimeRequirement: This setup requires Node.js 18+ or Bun 1+ on PATH and an MCP-compatible desktop tool. Tolaria checks the runtime before writing config so the tool is not left pointing at a broken command.
mcp.setup.writeEntryDescription: Confirming this action will write or update Tolaria's single {entry} MCP entry in:
mcp.setup.clientPathsDescription: Claude Code CLI reads ~/.claude.json, Antigravity CLI reads ~/.gemini/config/mcp_config.json, Cursor reads ~/.cursor/mcp.json, and the generic ~/.config/mcp/mcp.json path is picked up by other MCP-compatible tools using mcpServers. OpenCode reads ~/.config/opencode/opencode.json and uses its top-level mcp map. Closing leaves all files untouched unless you connect or disconnect, reconnecting is idempotent, and disconnecting removes Tolaria's entry again.
mcp.setup.geminiGuidanceDescription: Antigravity CLI needs its own install and sign-in. Use Restore Tolaria AI Guidance when you want a vault-root GEMINI.md compatibility shim that points Antigravity back to the shared AGENTS.md instructions without overwriting custom guidance.
mcp.setup.manual.title: Manual MCP configs
mcp.setup.manual.unavailable: Exact config is available after a vault is open.
mcp.toast.connected: Tolaria external AI tools connected successfully
mcp.toast.refreshed: Tolaria external AI tools setup refreshed successfully
mcp.toast.disconnected: Tolaria external AI tools disconnected successfully
mcp.toast.alreadyDisconnected: Tolaria external AI tools were already disconnected
mcp.toast.configCopied: Tolaria MCP config copied to clipboard
save.toast.missingActiveVault: Select or restore a vault before saving.
save.error.invalidPath: Save failed: The note path is invalid on this platform. Rename the note or move it to a valid folder, then try again.
sidebar.typeDelete.blockedInUseOne: Cannot delete {type}: 1 note still uses it. Change or remove that note's type first.
sidebar.typeDelete.blockedInUseMany: Cannot delete {type}: {count} notes still use it. Change or remove their type first.
sidebar.typeDelete.missingDefinition: Cannot delete {type}: no Type document was found. Reload the vault, then try again.
sidebar.action.createNoteInFolderMenu: Create a new note in this folder
sidebar.action.createFolderInFolderMenu: Create a new folder in this folder
sidebar.view.name: View name
sidebar.folder.name: Folder name
sidebar.section.name: Section name

noteList.sort.title: Title
noteList.changes.discardDescription: Discard changes to {file}? This cannot be undone.
editor.empty.selectNote: Select a note to start editing
editor.raw.label: Raw editor
editor.sheet.formula.description.and: Returns true when all arguments are true.
editor.sheet.formula.description.day: Extracts the day from a date.
editor.sheet.formula.description.iferror: Returns a fallback when a formula errors.
editor.sheet.formula.description.index: Returns a value from a range.
editor.sheet.formula.description.lookup: Looks up a value in a range.
editor.sheet.formula.description.match: Finds a value position in a range.
editor.sheet.formula.description.month: Extracts the month from a date.
editor.sheet.formula.description.now: Returns the current date and time.
editor.sheet.formula.description.or: Returns true when any argument is true.
editor.sheet.formula.description.round: Rounds a number to fixed digits.
editor.sheet.formula.description.roundup: Rounds a number away from zero.
editor.sheet.formula.description.xlookup: Looks up a value in a range.
editor.sheet.formula.description.year: Extracts the year from a date.
editor.whiteboard.permissionDeniedBody: Tolaria could not use a desktop capability that this whiteboard needs. Allow the permission in your system settings, then reopen the note.
editor.exportPdf.unavailable: Open a Markdown note before exporting a PDF.
editor.imageImport.unsupportedHeic: {filename} is a HEIC image. Tolaria cannot import HEIC or HEIF files yet. Export the photo as JPG or PNG and insert that file.
editor.imageImport.unsupported: {filename} is a {format} image. Tolaria cannot import this format yet. Use JPG, PNG, GIF, WebP, SVG, BMP, or TIFF.
editor.imageImport.remoteDownloadFailed: Tolaria kept the original links because {failedCount} of {totalCount} pasted images could not be saved locally.
deepLinks.error.ambiguousVault: Deep link matches more than one vault. Rename one vault alias in Settings.
deepLinks.error.invalidScheme: This is not a Tolaria deep link.
deepLinks.error.missingFile: Deep link target is not available in this vault.
deepLinks.error.missingPath: Deep link is missing a vault item path.
deepLinks.error.missingVault: Deep link is missing a vault.
deepLinks.error.outsideVault: This item cannot be linked because it is outside the vault.
deepLinks.error.unavailableVault: Deep link vault is not available on this device.
deepLinks.error.unknownVault: Deep link targets an unknown vault.
deepLinks.error.unsafePath: Deep link path cannot leave the vault.
noteGitUrls.error.unavailable: Git URL is not available for this note.
editor.htmlBlock.blockedFallback: This HTML was blocked by the sandbox rules.

status.history.onlyGit: History is only available for git-enabled vaults
